---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: page-header
# Projects
:::

Research tools, open-source work, and things built along the way. Some are live; most are works in progress.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: project-grid

::: project-card
[Live]{.project-status .status-live}

### Academic Website Template

An open-source Quarto template for building a professional academic website — free, no coding experience required, and deployable to GitHub Pages in under an hour. This site was built with it!

::: project-tags
[Quarto]{.project-tag} [GitHub Pages]{.project-tag} [CSS]{.project-tag} [Open source]{.project-tag}
:::

::: project-links
[Setup & walkthrough](https://connorconkeymorrison.com/template){.project-link}
[Download GitHub repo](https://github.com/ccicm/academic-website-template){.project-link-secondary}
:::
:::

::: project-card
[Under testing]{.project-status .status-wip}

### Truly Systematic Review

A Shiny app for developing, pulling, and testing search strings in PubMed data. Built to support [Paper 1](index.qmd) of my PhD.

::: project-tags
[Sys review]{.project-tag} [RStudio]{.project-tag} [Shiny]{.project-tag}
:::

::: project-links
[View on GitHub](https://github.com/ccicm/TrulySystematicReview){.project-link-secondary}
:::
:::

::: project-card
[Planned]{.project-status .status-planned}

### EBSA Intervention Evidence Map

An interactive evidence map for the systematic review of emotionally based school avoidance interventions. Planned as a living document updated alongside the review.

::: project-tags
[R]{.project-tag} [Systematic review]{.project-tag} [EBSA]{.project-tag} [Visualisation]{.project-tag}
:::
:::

::: project-card
[Planned]{.project-status .status-planned}

### Psychology Stats Reference

A quick-reference guide for common statistical procedures in psychology research — aimed at honours and postgraduate students. Covering assumption testing, effect sizes, and reporting conventions in APA style.

::: project-tags
[Jamovi]{.project-tag} [R]{.project-tag} [Statistics]{.project-tag} [Teaching]{.project-tag}
:::
:::

::: project-card
[Planned]{.project-status .status-planned}

### Clinical Resources

A collection of practical resources for children, young people, and the adults supporting them. Topics will include emotional regulation, challenging unhelpful thoughts, PMR, and body safety. Aimed at families and school-based practitioners.

::: project-tags
[Children]{.project-tag} [Parents]{.project-tag} [Clinical]{.project-tag} [Schools]{.project-tag}
:::
:::

:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: about-section
Have a question about any of these, or interested in collaborating? [Get in touch →](contact.qmd)
:::
